{{Quote|I suspect when the time is right, this device can be used to pinpoint the location of the HK factory - and I... I mean, we... can deal with them once and for all.|[[HK-47]], to [[Meetra Surik]]|<ref name="TSL">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
The '''HK Manufacturing Plant''' was a secret [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory used by the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[G0-T0]] to create [[HK-50 series assassin droid]]s during the [[Dark Wars]].

==History==
{{Quote|The location of the factory churning out these copies eludes me. And I do not know where they would have obtained schematics of my design. They are built from my template, of that I know for certain. |HK-47, to Meetra Surik|<ref name="TSL" />}}
After [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] witnessed first-hand the abilities of the [[HK-47]] [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] he created, he decided that more droids of this design would make excellent agents for his purposes. HK-47 became the basis for a new model of [[HK-series assassin droid]]s: the [[HK-50 series assassin droid|HK-50]]. Revan was captured and his memory was erased before this plan could be realized, however, and the production on the HK-50 model ceases for several years. Eventually, the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[G0-T0]], who was in fact a [[G0-T0 infrastructure planning system|planning droid]] previously assigned to [[Telos IV]], discovered the HK-50 manufacturing facility and reactivated it, disseminating the new model assassin droids throughout the galaxy searching for the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].<ref name="KOTORCG" />

During her travels [[Meetra Surik]] visited to the Telos factory along with HK-47. The assassin droid convinced the HK-50 models to join his cause. The combined droid forces later helped defeat [[G0-T0]] in a showdown on [[Malachor V]] allowing for the planet to finally be destroyed.<ref name="NEGD" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Subleveldoor.jpg|right|thumb|220px|The entrance of the HK Manufacturing Plant in the Telosian Military Base]]
{{Quote|The facility that is creating these cruder, unsophisticated versions of me is located on Telos. I propose we go there and turn it into a smoldering crater.|HK-47, to Meetra Surik|<ref name="TSLRCM">{{WebCite|url=https://deadlystream.com/files/file/578-tsl-restored-content-mod|text=TSL Restored Content Mod|work=[https://deadlystream.com/ deadlystream.com]|archivedate=20180603232926}}</ref>}}
The HK manufacturing plant was deleted from [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords|''Knights of the Old Republic II'']], though many of the source files were included with the PC version. The "entrance" to the HK Manufacturing Plant however is still in game though the door is sealed shut. When the PC reaches the [[Telosian Military Base|Military Base]] on Telos, a door labeled "Sub-Level" is sealed. Beyond the door is supposed to be an elevator leading down into the sub level of the base where a number of control rooms are present to the base and then another elevator into the actual Manufacturing Plant.<ref name="TSL" /><ref name="TSLRCM" />

The HK Manufacturing Plant has been restored by The Sith Lords Restored Content Mod.<ref name="TSLRCM" />

===Cut Content===
[[File:Hksublevel.jpg|right|thumb|220px|The main entrance room of the HK Manufacturing Plant]]
[[File:Hkfactory.jpg|right|thumb|220px|A room in the cut interior of the HK Manufacturing Plant]]
In the cut version of the game, the plant was run by [[G0-T0]] to produce HK-50 and [[HK-51 series assassin droid|HK-51]] assassin droids. HK-47 visited the plant during [[Meetra Surik]]'s journey to locate missing [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] members. During his time in the factory, HK-47 fought a large number of HK-50 droids, and a much smaller number of HK-51 droids. HK-47 had the option to persuade either the HK-50 or the HK-51 droids to join him and defeat [[G0-T0]] on Malachor V. He also had the option to destroy all the droids.<ref name="TSLRCM" />

According to [[Chris Avellone]], [[Bao-Dur]] was intended to die while helping HK-47 reach and shut down the factory.<ref>{{WebCite|url=https://forums.obsidian.net/blogs/entry/120-kotor-ii-questions|text=Kotor II Questions|author=[[Chris Avellone]]|date=2009-10-15|work=the official [[Obsidian Entertainment]] forums|archivedate=20200612181330}}</ref>
